ordinal_self_stamp_basis: Third-level meta over the whole 2026-04-25/26 batch — first-order ω = each agent's own cycle, ω·2 = per-batch axis sweep (e.g. commit-grouping), ω·3 = cross-batch race-condition meta-analysis. No ε_0 nesting; flat ω·3.
rule: raw 71 (conservative falsifier — F-RACE-1 hand-constructed) + raw 73 (minimal — ≤250-line dossier, 4 axes here) + raw 77 (audit append-only, transcript-blind honesty bound).
subject: Meta-analysis of parallel-agent race conditions across 2026-04-26 ω-cycle batches (10/4/13/4/4 ≈ 35 dispatches). 5 known race events cataloged + 6 hypothesized non-manifesting classes + structural defenses + N=100 fragility + flock/bus/phase/preflight recommendations + F-RACE-1 falsifier. Verdict WARN.

axes_acted.name: race_event_catalog
axes_acted.summary: 5 known events tabulated (sweep+grouping convergence on a339b29c, F999/F998 self-clean, .githooks racy delete, stale-brief 49 files in dd147a165+b99adc958, atlas-ingest a2 line-number drift). Severity LOW/NONE/MEDIUM/MEDIUM/LOW. All recovered without data loss.

axes_acted.name: hypothetical_race_classes
axes_acted.summary: 6 classes that did NOT manifest enumerated (H1 write-write divergent, H2 producer/consumer ordering, H3 transitive cache invalidation, H4 signal-handler+selftest, H5 FD exhaustion, H6 lock-free append interleave > PIPE_BUF). Absence of incident != absence of risk.

axes_acted.name: structural_defenses_and_fragility
axes_acted.summary: Clean-resolution roots: append-only invariants (raw 77), low-overlap partition by axis, idempotent operations, content-addressable git, preflight habits (raw 71). N=100 break-points: index.lock contention, working-tree race rate ~10×, stale-brief saturation, FD ceiling, JSONL > PIPE_BUF, idempotency assumption fails for non-mechanical edits.

axes_acted.name: falsifier_and_verdict
axes_acted.summary: F-RACE-1 hand-constructed: agents A (string tighten) + B (B2 nested-if-continue sweep) collide on tool/atlas_ingest.hexa lines 624-630, last-writer-wins silently destroys A's patch. Mitigation: advisory flock(2) per .hexa source. Verdict: WARN — zero data loss observed at N≤13, but Event 1 saved only by idempotency; F-RACE-1 constructible. Path to PASS: implement flock + agent_bus + enforced preflight git-status.

fixpoint_marker: Dossier 131 lines (≤250 budget), 4 axes (≤4 budget), all 5 known events cited by commit hash or witness path, F-RACE-1 falsifier verbatim in §6, honesty bound §8 names what was NOT seen (live transcripts, exact T₀ values, additional near-misses, true N of 13-batch).
